recent_reviews.content: Delivery time has increased drastically in Bangalore. Used to get in 10 min now it takes 25-30 min. Very disappointed.
Prices are higher than Blinkit and SwiftMart for the same items. No longer value for money. Switching to competitors.
Zepto Pass is amazing! ₹99 for unlimited free delivery is a steal. Much cheaper than Swiggy Instamart.
App crashes constantly on Android 15. 3 failed orders in last week. This is unacceptable.
Good variety but the freshness of vegetables is inconsistent. Hit or miss.
Zepto Pass saved me so much money this month. Delivery in 12 minutes flat in Koramangala.
Customer support is non-existent. Waited 40 mins for a refund response. Never again.
New snacks section is great. Lots of brands I can't find on other apps.
